creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
Git is used only by `go get` and go.mk doesn't call `go get` anywhere. The fact that it was called most likely means that one of the dependencies was specified incorrectly (probably by modules2tuple) and `go build` tried to correct the mistake by calling `go get` to fetch the right one. This wouldn't work anyway because network is not available during the build.

Adding dependency on devel/git or -buildvcs=false flag wouldn't fix this.
